## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's SEO strategy proposal for Abnormal Security and next steps for potential engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX conducted in-depth analysis of Abnormal Security's current SEO performance, identifying significant growth opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Proposal aims to outperform current content syndication ROI within 12 months using \~20% of existing budget](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Abdallah to discuss internally with leadership (Ryan, VP of Revenue Marketing) and content team (Jade Hill) for buy-in](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes high-quality, editor-reviewed content leveraging AI for research and planning, not "AI-generated content"](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Performance Analysis

  - [1,100 indexed pages (360 blogs, 62 glossary, 38 solution pages)](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Ranking for \~9,000 keywords across various positions](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [885 URLs currently ranking, with blogs (281) being the primary driver](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Significant opportunity in blog, glossary, and intelligence/resources sections](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

### Competitor Gap Analysis

  - [Analyzed 5 competitors, identifying 41,000 keywords where competitors rank top 20 but Abnormal doesn't](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [5,300 potential new pages to target these gaps](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Proofpoint (main competitor) alone represents 1,800 potential pages with 5M search volume](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [Aim to publish 50,000 words/month for blog + refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Several thousand programmatic pages within 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [First 3 months: few hundred programmatic pages, \~150,000 words for blog/refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Emphasis on quality, editor review, and AI-assisted research and planning](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### Timeline and Expectations

  - [12-month program with early signals expected in 3-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Typical growth curve shared, noting Abnormal's strong backlink profile (700,000 backlinks) may accelerate results](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)

### Internal Alignment and Next Steps

  - [Abdallah to discuss with Ryan (VP Revenue Marketing) and potentially Jade Hill (Head of Content)](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Need to address potential concerns about content quality and AI usage](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Aim to launch within 1-2 weeks, latest within Abdallah's first 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send detailed documentation, including analysis shown in meeting](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [Abdallah to discuss internally with Ryan today (2025-01-27)](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Abdallah to push for quick decision, aiming to start by February 17th if possible](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Potential final call with all stakeholders if needed for final approval](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Abdallah to inform Marcel by end of next day (2025-01-28) if additional meeting is required](https://fathom.video/share/UWbRK7wVGd6Lf8qHtiS_o1vBnYNhTMfz?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
